config.note: Every cache-build cost is timed and reported separately from search: the ONE-TIME initial build (charged to first-turn total + break-even) and the RECURRING mid-conversation refresh cost (reported as refresh_ms_per_event, and folded into blended_followup_ms since it is real recurring work). marginal_followup_ms excludes refresh entirely and is directly comparable to static TopLoc (v11).
